defaults.title: About Us
defaults.body: Bread of Life Community Church is a welcoming congregation where people gather to worship God, grow in faith, and serve others. We would love to meet you.
defaults.motherChurchDescription: Bread of Life Christian Church is connected to River of Life Christian Church (ROLCC) in Silicon Valley — a mother church that continues to encourage and support our congregation.
